nav-home: Main navigation item for home page.
nav-about: Main navigation item for about page.
nav-api: Main navigation item for explorer page.
interface-language-label: Label for the interface language selector in the top header.
interface-language-placeholder: Placeholder text for the interface language selector with no selected value.
interface-language-en: Option label for English in the interface language selector.
interface-language-es: Option label for Spanish in the interface language selector.
interface-language-fr: Option label for French in the interface language selector.
interface-language-he: Option label for Hebrew in the interface language selector.
explorer-title: Heading for the API explorer page.
explorer-description: Short instruction text under explorer heading.
explorer-instance-label: Label for the wiki instance selector.
explorer-loading-modules: Shown while discovery modules are loading.
explorer-module-placeholder: Placeholder text for module selector with no selected value.
explorer-instance-placeholder: Placeholder text for instance selector with no selected value.
explorer-loading-interface: Shown while the Scalar explorer bundle is loading after the page chrome has rendered.
explorer-refresh-button: Button to retry discovery after failure.
explorer-empty-modules: Shown when discovery returns no modules.
explorer-spec-missing: Shown when no module spec URL can be resolved.
explorer-debug-empty: Shown when there are no diagnostics events recorded yet.
